description_long: This is a single bed set against a vertically striped wall, featuring a soft pink comforter draped over the mattress. At the head of the bed, there are two pillows and a small brown teddy bear placed centrally. To the left side of the bed, a wooden nightstand holds a white lamp, adding a touch of functionality and decor. The bed sits on a light-colored platform that extends beyond the mattress, creating a defined sleeping area. The overall design is cozy and inviting, with a gentle color palette dominated by pinks and neutrals. The headboard is integrated with the wall, providing support and a visual anchor for the bed.
description: A cozy single bed with a pink comforter, pillows, and a teddy bear, set against a striped wall with a nightstand and lamp. The bed sits on a light platform, creating a soft and inviting sleeping area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bed's length, the nightstand with a lamp, and the teddy bear on the pillows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard, centered teddy bear, and symmetrical arrangement of bedding and nightstand.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the bed's profile, pillows, and the nightstand from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing only the striped wall and the back of the headboard, with the bed itself mostly obscured.
